title: Pathlib, Content Discovery, Roots, Symlinks, and Admission · Language Clinic: Route Collision
summary: Recursive discovery follows a symlink outside content, includes hidden drafts and generated output, treats directories as documents, and overwrites two sources onto one route. Predict the reader decision, source identity, parse state, output URL, accessibility result, failure, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the route collision increment in bounded content-discovery manifest. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case p…
objectives: Detect case, Unicode, normalization, index, extension, and slug collisions before any output write.
Admit or reject symlinks using resolved ancestry, cycle handling, file type, and ownership policy.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-static-site-python cumulative production static-site generator portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python parser, route, render, graph, and publication models
with original fixed in-memory fixtures only. Native filesystems, full CommonMark, markdown-it-py,
Jinja, validators, browsers, GitHub Actions, Pages, DNS, TLS, CDN caches, and production effects
require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class PublicationPolicy:
    base_path: str = "/handbook/"
    encoding: str = "utf-8"
    raw_html_allowed: bool = False
    max_document_bytes: int = 262_144
    max_nesting_depth: int = 64


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class BuildEvidence:
    revision: str
    content_manifest_digest: str
    route_manifest_digest: str
    artifact_digest: str
    accessibility_review_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python static-site generator portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Worked focus: ssg-route-collision — Detect case, Unicode, normalization, index, extension, and slug collisions before any output write.
# Evidence: ssg-worked-static-site-paths-content-discovery-3
# Competency: ssg-worked-static-site-paths-content-discovery-3.
# Case 5798: a large technical reference incremental rebuild.
# Operating constraint: retain reader, content owner, revision, configuration, source, parser, route, artifact, deployment, and result identity.
# Changed case: insert malformed nested delimiters and retain later valid content with a located diagnostic.
def worked_static_site_paths_content_discovery_3(discovered: int = 12, admitted: int = 10, rejected: int = 2, root_escapes: int = 0, route_collisions: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked3 = "worked3-3dekrow-5798"
    assert evidence_variant_worked3
    evidence_axes_worked3 = (
        "readerworked3",
        "source5798",
        "parse3dekrow",
        "routeworked35798",
        "artifact5798worked3",
        "recovery3dekrow5798",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked3)) == 6
    if min(discovered, admitted, rejected) < 0:
        return False, discovered, "discovery-count"
    if admitted + rejected != discovered:
        return False, admitted, "discovery-reconciliation"
    if root_escapes > 0:
        return False, root_escapes, "root-escape"
    if route_collisions > 0:
        return False, route_collisions, "route-collision"
    assert admitted + rejected == discovered
    return True, admitted, "admitted-content-manifest"

# Evidence: ssg-route-collision-a7v8qd
# Competency: ssg-route-collision.

# Operating constraint: record the first failed invariant, repair, regression evidence, reader task, rollback, recovery, and residual-risk owner.

def evidence_ssg_route_collision_a7v8qd(discovered: int = 12, admitted: int = 10, rejected: int = 2, root_escapes: int = 0, route_collisions: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_a7v8qd = "a7v8qd-dq8v7a-9354"

    evidence_axes_a7v8qd = (
        "readera7v8qd",
        "source9354",
        "parsedq8v7a",
        "routea7v8qd9354",
        "artifact9354a7v8qd",
        "recoverydq8v7a9354",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_a7v8qd)) == 6
    if min(discovered, admitted, rejected) < 0:
        return False, discovered, "discovery-count"
    if admitted + rejected != discovered:
        return False, admitted, "discovery-reconciliation"
    if root_escapes > 0:
        return False, root_escapes, "root-escape"
    if route_collisions > 0:
        return False, route_collisions, "route-collision"
    assert admitted + rejected == discovered
    return True, admitted, "admitted-content-manifest"

Real filesystems, full CommonMark, markdown-it-py, Jinja, validators, browsers, GitHub Actions, Pages, DNS, TLS, CDN caches, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Detect case, Unicode, normalization, index, extension, and slug collisions before any output write.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Detect case, Unicode, normalization, index, extension, and slug collisions before any output write.
